jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Milkbasket
jsonLd.description:
Milkbasket invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Milkbasket:
Milkbasket is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Milkbasket!
